body.purpose: Default text for item names, descriptions, form fields.

mono.purpose: Price values, currency labels, slugs, and any numeric data compared across rows.

label.purpose: Section headers, field labels, pills, and metadata. Always uppercase.

section.purpose: Section dividers like DRAFT, FOLLOWING, NAME, LEAGUE.

chrome-title.purpose: Extension name in the top bar.

shadows.name: panel-ambient-light
shadows.purpose: Panel container shadow in light mode.

shadows.name: panel-ambient-dark
shadows.purpose: Panel container shadow in dark mode.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, tab switch).

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Tab switches, modal entrances, sheet slides.

breakpoints.name: panel
breakpoints.purpose: Fixed sidebar width. All layouts are designed for this single width.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button. Unique amber background, white text, uppercase. Used for Save This Search, Publish, Create List.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #AF6025; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #7A3F15; border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 14px; height: 36px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.4px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.15), 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7A3F15; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #AF6025; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Dashed border, transparent background. Used for Cancel, New List, Open trade site.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #4A4038; border: 1px dashed #CFC4B4; border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 10px; height: 26px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-style: solid; border-color: #504840; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #AF6025; }

components.name: Accent Ghost Button
components.description: Accent-ghosted button. Solid accent-edge border, accent-ink-strong text. Used for Publish, Follow CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost-accent { background: transparent; color: #7A3F15; border: 1px solid #7A3F15; border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 10px; height: 26px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost-accent:hover { background: #F0DDD0; } .ds-btn-ghost-accent:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #AF6025; }

components.name: Accent Pill
components.description: Accent pill for DRAFT, ACTIVE, and league badges.
components.css: .ds-pill-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase; background: #3A2010; color: #D4956A; border: 1px solid #7A3F15; border-radius: 2px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Neutral Pill
components.description: Neutral pill for item counts, league tags, and metadata badges.
components.css: .ds-pill-neutral { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase; background: #2A2520; color: #8C7B6A; border: 1px solid #504840; border-radius: 2px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Item Row
components.description: The canonical list item. Checkbox + name + price + kebab. Flat, bottom-border only.
components.html: Crown of Eyes (Hubris Circlet) 1.8 div
components.css: .ds-item-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #3A3430; } .ds-item-check { width: 14px; height: 14px; border: 1px solid #504840; border-radius: 2px; background: transparent; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #F5F2EE; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-item-check--checked { background: #AF6025; border-color: #7A3F15; } .ds-item-name { flex: 1; min-width: 0; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #C4B8A8; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-item-price { font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #D4956A; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-item-currency { font-size: 10px; opacity: 0.7; margin-left: 2px; } .ds-item-kebab { color: #8C7B6A; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; border: 0; padding: 0 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with accent focus border. Used for list names, search names, build URLs.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.6px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8C7B6A; } .ds-input { border: 1px solid #3A3430; border-radius: 2px; padding: 8px 10px; font-size: 13px; background: #0D0B0E; color: #C4B8A8; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #AF6025; }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Horizontal tab navigation. Active tab has accent underline and accent-ink-strong text.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid #504840; background: #181510; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; padding: 11px 0; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; color: #8C7B6A; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border: 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; text-align: center; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-tab:hover { color: #C4B8A8; } .ds-tab--active { font-weight: 600; color: #D4956A; border-bottom-color: #AF6025; }

components.name: Chrome Bar
components.description: Top bar with extension identity, league pill, and settings gear.
components.html: PoE Shopping List Phrecia SC
components.css: .ds-chrome { height: 32px; background: #2A2520; border-bottom: 1px solid #080608; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 8px; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chrome-icon { width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 2px; background: #AF6025; border: 1px solid #7A3F15; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chrome-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2px; color: #C4B8A8; } .ds-chrome-gear { width: 22px; height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #8C7B6A; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; border: 0; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-chrome-gear:hover { background: #2A2520; }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Collapsible section divider with label, count, and action link.
components.html: ▾ Draft · Penance Brand ⋯
components.css: .ds-section-hdr { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #1A1714; border-bottom: 1px solid #3A3430; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; color: #8C7B6A; } .ds-section-hdr-toggle { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-section-hdr-label { } .ds-section-hdr-count { opacity: 0.6; font-weight: 400; } .ds-section-hdr-action { margin-left: auto; font-size: 10px; color: #D4956A; cursor: pointer; }

narrative.overview: A workbench where every tool has its place. Functional, compact, no decoration beyond what earns its keep. The PoE Shopping List sidebar sits alongside the official trade site, and it must feel like it belongs there, not like a third-party overlay fighting for attention. The palette is drawn directly from Path of Exile's own visual language: Void black and Dungeon stone for dark foundations, Unique amber as the single accent color, Pale fog for text. The accent marks interactive elements and price data; everything else recedes. The system is flat by default. Depth comes from tonal layering (surface vs. background, surface-tab vs. surface), not from shadows. The only shadow in the entire interface is a subtle ambient one on the panel container itself. Buttons feel pressed into the surface rather than raised above it. States are unambiguous but never loud.
keyCharacteristics: PoE-authentic palette: Void black, Dungeon stone, Unique amber, Pale fog text
Single accent color (Unique amber) used sparingly for actions and price data
Flat surfaces with tonal layering for depth
Monospace for prices and data, system sans for everything else
Sharp corners (2-3px radius), no rounded-pill shapes
Uppercase labels with wide letter-spacing for section headers and pills
Quiet components that recede until needed
PoE rarity colors available for semantic states (Skill gem teal for success, Molten terracotta for warnings, Blood rose for errors, Cold sky blue for info)

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Unique amber is the only saturated color on the surface. It marks actions (buttons, active tabs) and data (prices, league pills). If something is amber, it's either clickable or it's a number the user needs. Everything else is ink or muted ink on parchment. No second accent color.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is tinted toward amber. There are no cool grays, no blue-grays, no pure whites. Void Black is warm black, not neutral black. Pale Fog is warm cream, not white. The palette lives in the warm spectrum end to end.

rules.name: The Rarity-as-Semantic Rule
rules.body: PoE rarity colors double as semantic UI states: Skill Gem teal for success, Molten terracotta for warnings, Blood rose for errors, Cold sky blue for info. They're never used decoratively; they carry meaning.

rules.name: The Monospace-for-Data Rule
rules.body: Any number that the user compares across rows (prices, counts, totals) uses the mono font. Prose text (names, descriptions, labels) uses the system sans. Never mix them within a single text element.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No card shadows, no floating panels, no drop shadows on list items. The only shadow is the panel container itself. If a component needs to feel elevated, use a tonal step (surface vs bg), not a shadow.

dos: Use Unique amber exclusively for interactive elements and price data
Use tonal layering (surface vs. void-black) to create depth without shadows
Use monospace for all numeric data that users compare across rows
Keep the sidebar at 380px width. Density is a feature
Use uppercase labels with wide letter-spacing (0.6px) for section headers, field labels, and pills
Use the PoE-authentic palette end to end. Void black, Dungeon stone, Pale fog, Unique amber
Make the accent functional, not decorative
Use 2-3px border radius everywhere. Sharp corners, not rounded
Let components recede until the user needs them
Use Skill Gem teal for success states, Molten terracotta for warnings, Blood rose for errors, Cold sky blue for info
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient)
Don't use glassmorphism (blur + transparency) as a default
Don't create hero-metric templates (big number, small label, gradient accent)
Don't use identical card grids. Item rows are flat list items with a bottom border
Don't use modals as the first response. Bottom sheets and inline states are preferred
Don't use cool grays, blue-grays, or pure whites/blacks. Every neutral is warm-tinted
Don't use celebration animations, confetti, or achievement badges
Don't use PoE rarity colors decoratively. They carry semantic meaning only
